info.title: CoinGecko Onchain DEX API
info.description: CoinGecko onchain DEX market data exposed through x402. This spec is adapted from the official CoinGecko Onchain Pro OpenAPI document and rewritten to match the live x402 URL shape.

get.description: This endpoint allows you to **get token price based on the provided token contract address on a network**

parameters.name: network
parameters.description:
network ID 
 *refers to [/networks](/reference/networks-list)

parameters.name: addresses
parameters.description: token contract address, comma-separated if more than one token contract address

parameters.name: include_market_cap
parameters.description: include market capitalization, default: false

parameters.name: mcap_fdv_fallback
parameters.description: return FDV if market cap is not available, default: false

parameters.name: include_24hr_vol
parameters.description: include 24hr volume, default: false

parameters.name: include_24hr_price_change
parameters.description: include 24hr price change, default: false

parameters.name: include_total_reserve_in_usd
parameters.description: include total reserve in USD, default: false

parameters.name: include_inactive_source
parameters.description: include token price data from inactive pools using the most recent swap, default: false

200.description: Get current USD prices of multiple tokens on a network

get.description: This endpoint allows you to **search for pools on a network by pool address, token name, token symbol, or token contract address**

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: search query, can be pool contract address, token name, token symbol, or token contract address

parameters.name: network
parameters.description:
network ID 
 *refers to [/networks](/reference/networks-list)

parameters.name: include
parameters.description:
attributes to include, comma-separated if more than one to include 
 Available values: `base_token`, `quote_token`, `dex`

parameters.name: page
parameters.description:
page through results 
 Default value: 1

200.description: Search for pools on a network

get.description: This endpoint allows you to **query the trending pools based on the provided network**

parameters.name: network
parameters.description:
network ID 
 *refers to [/networks](/reference/networks-list)

parameters.name: include
parameters.description:
attributes to include, comma-separated if more than one to include 
 Available values: `base_token`, `quote_token`, `dex`

parameters.name: page
parameters.description:
page through results 
 Default value: 1

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description:
duration to sort trending list by 
 Default value: 24h

parameters.name: include_gt_community_data
parameters.description:
include GeckoTerminal community data (Sentiment votes, Suspicious reports) 
 Default value: false

200.description: Get trending pools on a network

get.description: This endpoint allows you to **query specific token data based on the provided token contract address on a network**

parameters.name: network
parameters.description:
network ID 
 *refers to [/networks](/reference/networks-list)

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: token contract address

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: attributes to include

parameters.name: include_composition
parameters.description: include pool composition, default: false

parameters.name: include_inactive_source
parameters.description: include token data from inactive pools using the most recent swap, default: false

200.description: Get specific token on a network

get.summary: Coin Price by IDs, Symbols, or Names
get.description: This endpoint allows you to **query the prices of one or more coins by using their unique Coin API IDs, symbols, or names**

parameters.name: vs_currencies
parameters.description:
target currency of coins, comma-separated if querying more than 1 currency. 
 *refers to [`/simple/supported_vs_currencies`](/reference/simple-supported-currencies).

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description:
coins' IDs, comma-separated if querying more than 1 coin. 
 *refers to [`/coins/list`](/reference/coins-list).

parameters.name: names
parameters.description: coins' names, comma-separated if querying more than 1 coin.

parameters.name: symbols
parameters.description: coins' symbols, comma-separated if querying more than 1 coin.

parameters.name: include_tokens
parameters.description:
for `symbols` lookups, specify `all` to include all matching tokens 
 Default `top` returns top-ranked tokens (by market cap or volume)

parameters.name: include_market_cap
parameters.description: include market capitalization, default: false

parameters.name: include_24hr_vol
parameters.description: include 24hr volume, default: false

parameters.name: include_24hr_change
parameters.description: include 24hr change percentage, default: false

parameters.name: include_last_updated_at
parameters.description: include last updated price time in UNIX, default: false

parameters.name: precision
parameters.description: decimal place for currency price value

resource.description: Coin Price by IDs, Symbols, or Names
